title: Llama speculative decoding (draft + target model verifier)
description:
Spun out from #612 which landed beam search. Speculative decoding (Leviathan et al. 2023) uses a small draft model to propose K tokens, then verifies them with the big target model in a single forward pass. If the target accepts all K, you advance K tokens for one big-model forward.

Implementation needs:
- A 'draft' model handle separate from the 'target' model.
- Token-level acceptance criterion: accept if target_prob[token] >= draft_prob[token], else with prob target/draft.
- Rollback on rejection: take a corrected sample from the residual distribution.

Heavier than beam search because it touches the model interface (need a way to run K candidate tokens through the big model in parallel rather than autoregressively).
